gdalviz 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Pipeline gallery
  • Changelog

Changelog

Source: CHANGELOG.md

[unreleased]

🚀 Features

  • cicd: R CMD check matrix, git-cliff changelog automation, and quarto setup for pkgdown (832e951) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • branding: Hex logo, pkgdown favicons, README badges and corrected examples (d74475d) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • contract: Flatten input/output argument groups and enforce mutual-exclusion linting (942d3e1) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • pipeline: Improve display and inspection of merged steps (56081f5) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • pipeline: Merge repeated pipeline steps for clearer graph visualization (f80f06f) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • pipeline: Merge repeated pipeline steps for clearer graph visualization (ff6c9e8) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • pipeline: Improve global arg representation and add contract refresh (29f62b5) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • pipeline: Support global arguments and contract refresh (374c2c8) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • viz: Add interactive React Flow pipeline visualization (76b2675) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Implement GDAL pipeline parsing and visualization (cccbece) - (Jimmy Briggs)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • render: Dashed config/implicit edge styling in g6 and graphviz backends (72185d6) - (Jimmy Briggs)

🎉 Initial Commit

  • Initial commit (23f402a) - (Jimmy Briggs)

🎉 Initial Commit

  • dev: Add R package development initialization script (994a075) - (Jimmy Briggs)

➕ Add

  • Add GitHub links to DESCRIPTION (ac50df0) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add pipeline validation and v0 package polish

Co-authored-by: Copilot 223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com (fc5ef41) - (Jimmy Briggs)

🚜 Refactor

  • repo: Remove empty placeholder files and relocate dev scripts out of inst/extdata (a32c873) - (Jimmy Briggs)

📚 Documentation

  • vignettes: Quarto getting-started vignette, interactive pipeline-gallery article, pkgdown reference index, and 0.1.0 NEWS (1b3e9e2) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • cicd: Add pkgdown workflow status badge to README (1b2bee6) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • Add website URL to package documentation and refactor code formatting (62fcd76) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • cicd: Configure automated pkgdown website deployment (76a36c0) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • readme: Add React Flow visualization examples and update content (4333379) - (Jimmy Briggs)

📝 Other

  • PR #1: contract-based pipeline linting and v0 package polish (ab0230f) - (Jimmy Briggs)

🧪 Testing

  • Widget bundle guard, globals round-trip, and clean spelling check (65e1de1) - (Jimmy Briggs)

⚙️ Miscellaneous Tasks

  • meta: Gitattributes, editorconfig, Makefile, and AGENTS.md repository contract (1f5d0cb) - (Jimmy Briggs)
  • repo: Untrack mcp.env and drop committed dev json snapshot (2f9e6b2) - (Jimmy Briggs)

On this page

Developed by Jimmy Briggs.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
